archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) infused with Gen-Z Y2K Elements
design_philosophy: A frictionless, high-energy C2C marketplace blending Neo-Brutalist bold contrast for Gen-Z appeal with an elite 'Control Room' SaaS dashboard for vendors/students managing their items.

colors.notes: Use Vivid Azure (Primary) for primary trust actions. Use Electric Cyan (Accent) strictly for kinetic triggers, micro-interactions, and highlights. Never use pure #000000 or #ffffff; always use the tinted HSL variables above.

marketplace_mode.grid: Bento 'Tetris' Grid (Mode A). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with gap-8 or gap-12.
marketplace_mode.philosophy: Asymmetry creates tension. Use overlapping elements, generous p-8/p-12 paddings, and negative space.
marketplace_mode.hero_image: Max overlay opacity bg-black/40. If text contrast is needed, use bg-gradient-to-r.

dashboard_mode.grid: Control Room Grid (Mode B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6.
dashboard_mode.philosophy: Density, clarity, and flat structures. Every pixel utilized. h-full on children.
dashboard_mode.surfaces: Neumorphism Tactile variants. Flat background, sharp 1px border (border-border), no massive drop shadows.

universal.container_padding: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.
universal.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, dense content. Center-align hero headings only if it balances the page.

surfaces_and_effects.header: Glassmorphism 'Crystal'. backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70. 1px delicate inner stroke (border-border/40). z-50 sticky.
surfaces_and_effects.cards: 1px subtle border (border-border), flat bg. On hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border color darkens.
surfaces_and_effects.buttons: High contrast. ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-primary/90 hover:text-primary-foreground).
surfaces_and_effects.marquee: Use an 'Editorial Ribbon' for feature/category lists. Low contrast bg, wide gap-24.

components_strategy.marketing_pages: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structure to allow creative overlapping and asymmetry.
components_strategy.forms_and_logic: ALWAYS use Shadcn UI components (Input, Select, Form, Checkbox) but heavily customize with Tailwind.
components_strategy.dashboard_data: Use Shadcn Table, Tabs, Cards, Dialogs. NO default HTML selects or datepickers.
components_strategy.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for Duotone weights in marketing, and regular weights in dashboard. Provide yarn add @phosphor-icons/react.
components_strategy.testing: All interactive/informational elements MUST include role-based kebab-case data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

hero.description: Gen Z students socializing on campus. Use for the main marketplace hero section with an overlay.

categories.description: Tech gadgets and electronics category thumbnail. Flatlay of aesthetic desk setup.
Fashion/Clothes category thumbnail. Row of colorful shirts on hangers.

products.description: Product image for modern tech/smartphone on charging stand.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react clsx tailwind-merge framer-motion lucide-react
Update tailwind.config.js with the provided HSL color variables and font families.
Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts via Google Fonts in index.css.
Ensure the application structure splits into two primary layouts: the Public Marketplace (asymmetrical, creative) and the SaaS Dashboard (dense, functional).
Never use generic placeholder images. ONLY use the provided URLs in the 'media' object.
Implement the theme toggle using next-themes or equivalent, defaulting to system preference.
All form interactions (search, filters, booking, login) MUST use customized Shadcn UI components.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, inputs, and major layout sections.
Do NOT use HTML native datepickers or selects; rely entirely on Shadcn.
For the hero image, apply a gradient overlay like bg-gradient-to-r from-black/60 to-transparent so text is readable without obscuring the image completely.
Ensure all Grid layouts use direct children for motion elements or valid subgrids to prevent layout breaking.
